name: rn-vite-sample
//: Nodepod's installer ignores lockfiles AND resolutions/overrides, and can't enumerate version-range wildcards, so every dep must be an exact pin AND every transitive wildcard must be eliminated at the source. The real 'react-native' package is intentionally NOT installed: vite-plugin-rnw aliases `react-native` -> `react-native-web` at build time, so RN is never bundled. Installing real react-native only drags in @react-native/codegen -> jscodeshift -> flow-parser@'0.*', which Nodepod can't resolve and which breaks the install. vite is pinned to 7.3.6 (last pre-rolldown release; Vite 8 bundles rolldown whose Nodepod wasm binding needs SharedArrayBuffer, unavailable under enableSharedArrayBuffer:false).
